description: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj was born at Shivneri Fort on February 19, 1630. This hill fort in Junnar became the cradle of the Maratha Empire.
At the age of 15, Shivaji captured Torna Fort, marking the beginning of Swarajya. This was the first fort taken under his independent command.
Rajgad served as the capital of the Maratha Empire for nearly 26 years. Its strategic location in the Sahyadri range made it nearly impregnable.
The legendary encounter between Shivaji Maharaj and Afzal Khan at Pratapgad Fort demonstrated unmatched courage and strategic brilliance.
The Treaty of Purandar was signed between Shivaji and Jai Singh I, representing Mughal Emperor Aurangzeb. It was a strategic diplomatic maneuver.
On June 6, 1674, Shivaji Maharaj was crowned at Raigad Fort, establishing an independent Hindu sovereignty after centuries of foreign rule.
